quiz.question:
Black saves their knight. 

Our knight will give up itself for a pawn since we'll have a rook for two pieces.

Is there a difference between ...Nxe6 and ...Nxg6?

answers.text: Yes! One of the moves wins a pawn!

feedback.text: Good job! The g6-pawn is attacked twice by our queen and by our knight.

distractors.text: No, capturing either pawn is good.

feedback.text:
Try to focus not only on the knight but on another piece that is in the attack. 

Which pawn is attacked twice?
